selected_topic: Reuters Europe News | Latest Headlines & Stories | Reuters
news_angle: Latest Europe news stories and breaking developments impacting world events
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a savvy news detective cat in a bustling newsroom styled like a busy European train station, juggling flashing headline screens as trains labeled with city names zoom behind him. He wears a sleek black hoodie and stylish glasses, holding a magnifying glass and a reporter’s notebook, with newspapers and coffee cups piled high. Nearby, a small mischievous mouse reporter tries sneaking a scoop, and a world map with pins and string markers lights up in the background.
image_prompt: Create a vibrant square Instagram illustration featuring Hunk Mao, the energetic orange tabby cat, as a clever news detective at a chaotic newsroom resembling a European train station hub. Hunk Mao wears a black hoodie, trendy glasses, and holds a magnifying glass over a newspaper. Behind him, digital train departure boards scroll city names like London, Paris, Berlin as glowing trains zoom past in midground and background. The foreground is cluttered with coffee cups, scattered newspapers with global headlines, and a cheeky mouse reporter hiding with a tiny notepad. A large map of Europe is pinned with strings connecting hotspot cities on a wall. Hunk Mao's confident mischievous grin shows he’s on top of the latest breaking news. Include lots of tiny easter eggs: miniature newspapers with recognizable news icons, subtle references to Europe landmarks like Eiffel Tower and Big Ben in window views, a stressed pigeon with a camera, and a hidden catnip mouse toy. Use dynamic lighting and active poses to emphasize youthful energy and chaos. REQUIRED TEXT: "LATEST EUROPE NEWS" in clear block letters at a digital board in the background.
easter_eggs: Mini newspapers with tiny European flags on front pages
Mouse reporter holding a notepad labeled 'scoop'
Pigeon with a tiny press badge and camera
View of Eiffel Tower and Big Ben through station windows
Catnip mouse toy hidden behind coffee cups
Pins and strings connecting European cities on map
Train boards with scrolling city names: London, Paris, Berlin
Small digital clock showing typical 'news rush' time
Stacks of coffee cups labeled 'Press Fuel'
Tiny newspaper headline with a cat-themed headline icon
caption: Europe’s latest headlines track shifting world events through nonstop breaking news from London to Berlin. Even a clever cat like me has to hustle to keep up—someone’s gotta chase the scoop, and it might as well be me!
risk_notes: Ensure all elements remain playful and avoid direct caricatures of real politicians; maintain a humorous but respectful tone toward sensitive global events.
